reviews.comment:
Pésima atención, 15 min esperando con tan solo un auto por surtidor, sin cola. Un señor mayor se tuvo que ir a buscar una bolsa de carbón porque los playeros estrella no lo hacían..

(Translated by Google)
Terrible service, 15-minute wait with only one car per pump, no line. An elderly gentleman had to go get a bag of charcoal himself because the attendants wouldn't do it.

reviews.comment:
La atención fue esmeradamente buena en las oficinas del ACA. Pusieron mucha voluntad para que pudiera solucionar un problema y explicaron cosas dedicándome mucho tiempo. Fue más de un empleado el que actuó de esa manera.
Los baños estaban limpios y la cafetería sirvió un rico café con leche a un precio moderado, cosa que a la vera de una ruta no es común.
Un lugar recomendable.

(Translated by Google)
The service at the ACA offices was exceptionally good. They were very willing to help me solve a problem and took a lot of time to explain things. More than one employee acted in this way.
The bathrooms were clean, and the cafeteria served a delicious café con leche at a reasonable price, which is unusual on the side of a highway.
A highly recommended place.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/16851497882005814309/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURneG96UVpnEAE
